description: Designed for everyday use, this backpack from reebok is perfect for carrying all your stuff in style. The bag comes with enough compartments to hold your essentials and even a laptop. Roomy and comfortable, it makes for a perfect carry on weekend getaways.Height: 17"Width: 13" Made of nylon with complete protective lining for easy cleaning and durability Branded zippers and sliders Big roomy main compartment with seperate padded laptop chamber that has a velcro strap closure Front utility compartment with mobile pouch with a velcro flap Two front utility pockets - one for essentials and the other one with puches for easy storage Mesh pockets on the sides for holding a sipper, etc. Padded haul loop for easy handling Mesh padding on the back and straps for extra comfort, ventillation and to protect the shoulders and back from injuries Adjustable straps for an ergonomic Fit and better support CareHand washDo not bleachDo not tumble dryDo not ironDo not wringDrip dry
